feedback: This game hits all the right notes for a basketball fan like me! The concept of an NBA Tankathon, specifically for a talent like Cooper Flagg, is incredibly creative and perfectly captures a unique strategic element of the league. I love the balancing act between driving down the 'Tank Score' while managing fan outrage and owner patience. The distinct choices for managing the team, from 'Play Fair' to the high-stakes 'Trade for Picks,' offer compelling gameplay. The clear UI with progress bars and the anticipation of the 'lottery machine' finale are excellent. This is a brilliant take on a basketball management sim, simple yet deeply engaging, and exactly the kind of game I enjoy sinking time into.
